# Customization Conflict Report

- Artifact B: <artifact-b>

## Conflict Description

Describe the exact contradiction, overlap, or failure interaction.

## Evidence

- Artifact A Evidence: <paths and excerpts>
- Artifact B Evidence: <paths and excerpts>
- Impact Evidence: <observed invocation issue, quality issue, or failure mode>

## Impact Assessment

- Severity: High | Medium | Low
- Affected Workflows: <list>
- User Impact: <description>

| Option | Description | Pros | Cons |
|---|---|---|---|
